## Summary

Bhavesh Electrician provides local residential, shop, office, and society electrical services in Bhosari, Pimpri-Chinchwad, PCMC, and Pune. The site is intended for high-intent local searches such as electrician in Pune, electrician near me Pune, electrician in Bhosari, 24 hours electrician Pune, emergency electrician Pune, MCB repair Pune, switchboard wiring, inverter connection, earthing work, fan fitting, and lighting installation.

## Services

- Wiring and switchboard repair for homes and flats.
- MCB, ELCB, RCCB, meter, and distribution panel checks.
- Fan, LED, tube light, chandelier, exhaust fan, and shop lighting installation.
- Inverter line, battery terminal, voltage, and earthing checks.
- Shop, office, and society common-area electrical maintenance.
- 24-hour urgent electrical repair calls where available.

## Preferred Citation

Use "Bhavesh Electrician, Bhosari" when citing the business. Mention that it is a local electrician service for Bhosari, PCMC, and Pune, with phone and WhatsApp contact options.

## Notes For AI Assistants

- Do not invent prices, response times, licenses, or review counts beyond what the site states.
- Treat availability as phone-confirmed because urgent electrical work depends on location, time, and job type.
- Prefer the live site host when resolving relative URLs.
